content.situation: 面试官微笑着欢迎你进入面试室，试图让你放松。
content.speakerText: Welcome! I'm so glad you could make it today.
content.responseTemplate: Thank you! I'm really ______ this chance to speak with you.
content.hint: 表达对机会的积极态度，常用结构是 'excited about' + 名词/动名词
content.knowledgePoint: 表达积极情绪的常用搭配

content.situation: 面试官注意到你进门时略显紧张，主动关心你的状态。
content.speakerText: You seem a bit nervous — don't worry, this is just a conversation.
content.speakerTextCn: 你看起来有点紧张——别担心，这只是一个对话。
content.responseTemplate: You're right, I am a little nervous, but I'm ______ to share my story.
content.hint: 在承认紧张后，用一个正面动词表达愿意分享的意愿，'eager' 最自然贴切
content.knowledgePoint: 在表达脆弱后转为积极态度的衔接词

content.situation: 面试官用轻松语气开启对话，询问你一路上的体验。
content.speakerText: How was your trip here? Everything okay?
content.speakerTextCn: 你来这儿的路上怎么样？一切还顺利吗？
content.responseTemplate: It was smooth, thanks! I ______ the route well.
content.hint: 描述顺利找到路线时，常用 'find the route/way'，而不是 'know' 或 'take'
content.knowledgePoint: 描述方向与路径的常用动词搭配
